print("\nBelow player (rows 11-16, cols 36-44):")
for i in range(11, 17):

# The player is at [8,38]-[12,42]. Row 13 has the red path start.
# Let me check if the red path is still there

print(f"\nRed path: {red_nodes[0]['pixels'] if red_nodes else 'none'} pixels")
if red_nodes:

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
